Workbench Split Kernel

Low-level split, gutter, resize, keyboard resize, min-size, callback, lifecycle, and localStorage persistence helpers. Product chrome belongs in higher-level patterns.

Horizontal split min 180px
Primary pane persists width
Nested vertical split
Top row-resize
Bottom keyboard arrows
Vertical split min 120px
Trace details destroy lifecycle available
PtoWorkbenchShell.initResizablePanes createSplitGutter direction: horizontal | vertical initNestedResizablePanes
